problem: Wound assessment is subjective and error-prone. Paper rulers are inaccurate (96% error rate). Documentation inconsistencies lead to compliance issues, and lack of standardized imaging makes it hard to track healing progress across facilities.
solution: Full-service wound imaging and documentation solution with Scout software. Provides physiological documentation (skin temperature measurement), HIPAA-compliant photography and measurement, EMR integration, and scalable standardization across care continuum.
